utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am still on the set !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey ! The wedding is in less than an hour !

emotion_cause.span: 3_The wedding is in less than an hour !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I know ! I am sorry ! The guy drunk , they will not let me go until we get this .

emotion_cause.span: 4_The guy drunk , they will not let me go until we get this .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God ! I am gonna have to find another minister .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am gonna have to find another minister .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No ! No , I am the minister ! Alright , look ... look , put em both on the phone , I will marry them right now .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am gonna have to find another minister .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ugh ! Joey , I have to go .

emotion_cause.span: 6_put em both on the phone , I will marry them right now .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey ! Do not you hang up on me ! I will marry you and me right now ! I have the power !

emotion_cause.span: 8_Do not you hang up on me !
